LIBRARY_OF_RUINA_STAGGER_RESISTANCE_POWE: Attack cards and non-ability unblocked damage reduce this resistance. At 0, immediately stuns with all physical resistances set to Fatal. Restores after next player turn ends.

[gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] has [blue]{Amount}[/blue] Stagger Resistance. Attack cards and non-ability unblocked damage reduce it. At 0, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is immediately [gold]stunned[/gold] and all physical resistances become [red]Fatal[/red]. Restores after next [gold]player turn ends[/gold].

LIBRARY_WEAK_POWER.title: Weak
LIBRARY_WEAK_POWER.description: During its duration, outgoing damage and chaos damage are reduced.
LIBRARY_WEAK_POWER.smartDescription: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold]'s [red]attack damage[/red] and [gold]chaos damage[/gold] are reduced by [blue]{Amount}[/blue]. No top-right counter means permanent.
LIBRARY_VULNERABLE_POWER.title: Vulnerable
LIBRARY_VULNERABLE_POWER.description: During its duration, HP damage causes additional HP loss.
LIBRARY_VULNERABLE_POWER.smartDescriptio: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes HP damage, they lose [blue]1[/blue] additional HP. No top-right counter means permanent.
LIBRARY_PROTECTION_POWER.title: Protection
LIBRARY_PROTECTION_POWER.description: During its duration, HP damage causes less HP loss.
LIBRARY_PROTECTION_POWER.smartDescriptio: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes HP damage, they lose [blue]1[/blue] less HP. No top-right counter means permanent.
LIBRARY_BREAK_PROTECTION_POWER.title: Break Protection
LIBRARY_BREAK_PROTECTION_POWER.descripti: During its duration, incoming chaos damage is reduced.
LIBRARY_BREAK_PROTECTION_POWER.smartDesc: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] less [gold]chaos damage[/gold]. No top-right counter means permanent.
LIBRARY_BREAK_VULNERABLE_POWER.title: Break Vulnerable
LIBRARY_BREAK_VULNERABLE_POWER.descripti: During its duration, incoming chaos damage is increased.
LIBRARY_BREAK_VULNERABLE_POWER.smartDesc: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] takes [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more [gold]chaos damage[/gold]. No top-right counter means permanent.
LIBRARY_ENDURANCE_POWER.title: Endurance
LIBRARY_ENDURANCE_POWER.description: Players gain more Block; enemies take less attack damage.
LIBRARY_ENDURANCE_POWER.smartDescription: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, if [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is a player, they gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more [gold]Block[/gold]; if [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is an enemy, they take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] less [red]attack damage[/red]. No top-right counter means permanent.
LIBRARY_DISARM_POWER.title: Disarm
LIBRARY_DISARM_POWER.description: Players gain less Block; enemies take more attack damage.
LIBRARY_DISARM_POWER.smartDescription: For the next [blue]{Turns}[/blue] turns, if [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is a player, they gain [blue]{Amount}[/blue] less [gold]Block[/gold]; if [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] is an enemy, they take [blue]{Amount}[/blue] more [red]attack damage[/red]. LIBRARY_BLEEDING_POWER_DEFAULT.title: Bleed
LIBRARY_BLEEDING_POWER_DEFAULT.descripti: After attacking, take damage and lose stacks over time.
LIBRARY_BLEEDING_POWER_DEFAULT.smartDesc: Whenever [gold]{OwnerName}[/gold] deals [red]attack damage[/red], they take [red]{Amount}[/red] damage, then [gold]Bleed[/gold] loses one third of its stacks. It also loses one third of its stacks at end of turn; remove it below [blue]3[/blue] stacks.
